items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only

If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Reconvene to Regular Session at Approximately 7:00p.m.
Report Out on Closed Session from 5.5.21
Welcome by the School Board President

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h-NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Measure T Bond Program Tracking List of Items Under $20K
Approval of Modernization Project for Clifford School with Cumiskey Construction, Change Order #2
Approval of New Buildings Modernization and Sitework Project Bid Package C for Garfield Community School with Casey-Fogli, Change Order #1
Approval of Domestic Water Line Replacement Proposal for Garfield Community School with MK Pipelines
Update on the 2020-21 Spring Reopening Plan and Discussion on Reopening Plan for the 2021-22 School Year
2021 Plan for Educational Services for Expelled Students
Approval of April 14th Board Minutes (Study Session)
Approval of April 14th Board Minutes (Regular Meeting)
Approval of Agreement for Additional Mental Health Therapist at Kennedy Middle School with Effective School Solutions (ESS) Program
Approval of Declaration of Obsolete Textbooks
Ratification of Warrant Register, April 1, 2021 - April 30, 2021
Measure T Citizens Bond Oversight Committee - Membership and Duration/Term of Service
Approval of Classified General Leave Request(s)
Approval of Reclassification of Classified Employee
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Redwood City School District review of Connect Community Charter School's Second Interim Financial Report for Fiscal Year 2020-21
Redwood City School District review of KIPP's Second Interim Financial Report for Fiscal Year 2020-21
Redwood City School District review of Rocketship's Second Interim Financial Report for Fiscal Year 2020-21
Contract Update Information and Credit Card Summary
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Agenda Schedule

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 12.3 (2021 Plan for Educational Services for Expelled Students) moved from Discussion Items to Action Items. Items 14.2 and 14.3 (Approval of Classified General Leave Request(s) and Approval of Reclassification of Classified Employee) moved to consent agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve the consent items? And as a reminder, 14.2 and 14.3 moved to consent. So moved.

items.intro_words: Start with roll call, please. Trustee Wells.
Start with roll call, please. Trustee Wells.
So report out on closed session from today.
All right, let's see. So welcome everyone.
And then as a reminder, because all meetings are virtual, will be calling votes by roll call. All right, so thank you very much and changes to the agenda.
All right, Do I have a motion to approve?
All right, so under oral communication, I believe we have two comments.
So our next speaker is Jennifer Tonti. And Jennifer, you have three minutes once you get started.
All right, so I need a motion to approve the bond program, consent items.

Okay, so I need a motion to approve the bond program, consent items. So moved. I'll second roll call vote. Trustee Wells. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Aye. Christy Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diaz. Locum. Aye. President McAvoy. Aye. All right, no action items for the bond tonight. So we're on to. Let's see. No, we didn't move. Yeah, that's fine. Okay. All right, we're on to 12.1.
So the next portion we're going to start out with before we go on to reopening is what the principals are involved in right now, graduation and promotions.
All right, let's move forward please, Kyle. So now we're going to talk about the beginning of the planning for 2122.
All right, so our next agenda item is 14.1, which is an action item, and it's the recommendation, Measure T. Citizens Bond Oversight Committee. Membership and duration, terms of service.
All right, we are on to 12.3, which was moved to action. And that has to do with the 2021 Plan for Educational services for expelled students.
Okay, so we're on to board and superintendent reports.
Okay. Other business suggested items for future agenda.
Okay. Other business suggested items for future agenda. All right, Board agenda, calendar.
All right, well, I guess we're ready to adjourn. Do I have a motion to adjourn?
